About

Passion baked
into every layer

Passionate home baker with a creative eye for detail and a strong love for crafting high-quality, visually appealing baked goods. My style focuses on both taste and presentation, ensuring each product is not only delicious but also visually impressive.

Through personal baking work, I have developed strong skills in decorating, flavour pairing, and consistency. I take pride in maintaining cleanliness, organisation, and efficiency in the kitchen, and I am now seeking an opportunity to bring my creativity and passion to a professional bakery team.

Available for part-time or full-time roles — flexible & eager to learn
✦

Key Skills

  • Cake decorating and presentation
  • Attention to detail and creativity
  • Time management and kitchen organisation
  • Passion for baking and continuous learning
  • Recipe following and flavour experimentation

Experience

Home-Based Baking — Personal Projects

  • Designed and created custom celebration cakes and baked goods
  • Practised decorating techniques across multiple styles and themes
  • Managed end-to-end baking process from preparation to final presentation
  • Delivered custom orders to clients with attention to brief and quality
